stories.title: Fix XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in ContentPost.jsx
acceptance_criteria: ContentPost.jsx no longer uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization
DOMPurify or @portabletext/react used for safe Sanity content rendering
Unit tests pass
stories.context: CRITICAL XSS. File: src/ui/src/components/ContentPost.jsx:8,23. Two instances of dangerouslySetInnerHTML rendering CMS content. Use DOMPurify to sanitize or switch to @portabletext/react.

stories.title: Upgrade hono to >=4.12.7 (prototype pollution CVE)
acceptance_criteria: hono version in package.json is >=4.12.7
pnpm install succeeds
All unit tests pass
npm audit shows no hono vulnerabilities
stories.context: HIGH CVE GHSA-v8w9-8mx6-g223. Run: pnpm add hono@latest. Then run pnpm install && npx vitest run to verify.

stories.title: Telegram webhook use timing-safe comparison
acceptance_criteria: telegram.ts uses timingSafeEqual for webhook secret comparison
Existing WhatsApp timingSafeEqual utility reused
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/routes/telegram.ts:170. Replace !== with timingSafeEqual (already used in WhatsApp webhook verification). Import from existing utility.

stories.title: CSP nonce: generate nonce and update CSP header
acceptance_criteria: csp.ts generates a nonce via crypto.randomUUID() per request
CSP script-src uses nonce-<value> instead of unsafe-inline
Nonce value is passed to template rendering context
TypeScript compiles
stories.context: File: src/worker/lib/csp.ts:14-21. Add nonce generation: const nonce = crypto.randomUUID(). Replace 'unsafe-inline' with 'nonce-${nonce}' in script-src. Pass nonce to c.set('cspNonce', nonce) so templates can access it. Keep unsafe-inline temporarily as fallback until S-355b completes.

stories.title: CSP nonce: replace inline handlers in admin templates with nonce scripts
acceptance_criteria: No oninput/onclick inline handlers in admin templates
All inline JS moved to <script nonce=...> blocks
Admin panel weights page still functions correctly
TypeScript compiles
stories.context: File: src/worker/admin/weights.ts:45. Replace oninput="document.querySelector(...)" with addEventListener in a <script nonce="${nonce}"> block. Access nonce from c.get('cspNonce'). Then remove 'unsafe-inline' fallback from csp.ts.
stories.last_error: Budget exceeded ($1.00) on attempt 2 — need focused approach

stories.title: Apply secureHeaders() globally
acceptance_criteria: secureHeaders() applied via app.use('*', ...) instead of per-route
All routes return X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options headers
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/index.ts:107-108. Move secureHeaders() from /alerte/* to global middleware.

stories.title: Accessibility: add <main> landmarks to all React pages
acceptance_criteria: All pages (homepage, alerte, raportare, blog, gdpr) have a <main> landmark
Each page has exactly one <h1>
Heading hierarchy is sequential (h1 > h2 > h3)
stories.context: React SPA pages in src/ui/src/. Wrap page content in <main> element. Fix heading levels — ensure single h1 per page, proper h2/h3 nesting. Check App.jsx and each page component. Run npx vitest run to verify no regressions.

stories.title: Accessibility: add <main> landmarks to server-rendered admin/template pages
acceptance_criteria: All server-rendered pages (alerte detail, blog, admin) have <main> landmark
Heading hierarchy correct in HTML templates
All form inputs have accessible labels or aria-label
All images have alt text
stories.context:
Server-rendered HTML in src/worker/templates/ and src/worker/admin/. Add
wrapper, fix heading levels, add aria-label to form inputs (especially raportare form), add alt to tags. Check e2e/accessibility-full.spec.ts for exact assertions.
stories.last_error: TIMEOUT on attempt 0 — retrying with higher timeout

stories.title: Fix responsive CSS overflow at all breakpoints
acceptance_criteria: No horizontal overflow at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px viewports
All pages: homepage, alerte, raportare, blog, gdpr
E2E responsive tests pass
stories.context: Fixes 95 E2E responsive failures. Check e2e/responsive.spec.ts and e2e/responsive-full.spec.ts. Add overflow-x: hidden where needed, fix elements wider than viewport (tables, images, code blocks). Check src/ui/src/index.css and component styles.

stories.title: Add favicon.ico to static assets
acceptance_criteria: GET /favicon.ico returns 200 with image content-type
E2E asset-integrity test passes
stories.context: Fixes 5 E2E failures. Add a favicon.ico to src/static/ or src/ui/public/ so wrangler serves it. Check e2e/asset-integrity.spec.ts for expected behavior.

stories.title: Configure higher rate limits for test environment
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiter detects test/dev environment
Higher limits applied in test mode (e.g. 1000 req/hour vs 50)
Production limits unchanged
Unit tests pass
stories.context: Fixes 92 E2E failures from 429s. File: src/worker/lib/rate-limiter.ts. Check for DEV or TEST_MODE env var, or detect wrangler dev. Increase limits for non-production.

stories.title: Mock Sanity CMS API for local E2E tests
acceptance_criteria: Blog/ghid routes work in local dev without Sanity API access
Sanity mock returns realistic content structure
E2E blog tests pass locally
stories.context: Fixes 79 E2E failures from Sanity DNS resolution failure. File: src/worker/lib/sanity.ts:21-53. Add SANITY_MOCK env var check — when true, return hardcoded sample content instead of fetching. Or use Playwright route interception in test setup.

stories.title: Replace report-index array with individual KV keys per report
acceptance_criteria: Each community report stored as individual KV key (e.g. report:{id})
No shared mutable report-index array in KV
Report listing uses KV list with prefix instead of reading index
Existing report data migrated or handled gracefully
stories.context: File: src/worker/routes/community.ts:48. The race condition exists because multiple requests read-modify-write a shared report-index array. Fix: store each report as its own KV key with prefix 'report:'. Use c.env.CACHE.list({prefix: 'report:'}) to enumerate. This eliminates the shared mutable state entirely. Remove all JSON.parse(rawIndex) patterns.

stories.title: Add unit tests for concurrent community report submissions
acceptance_criteria: Unit test verifies two concurrent report submissions both persist
Unit test verifies report listing returns all submitted reports
All existing community.ts tests still pass
stories.context: After S-364a changes the storage pattern, add tests that simulate concurrent writes. Use vitest with miniflare KV mock. Verify no data loss when two reports are submitted simultaneously.

stories.title: Update vote endpoints to use individual KV keys
acceptance_criteria: Vote up/down reads and writes individual report KV key
No shared index mutation on vote
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/routes/community.ts. After S-364a stores reports individually, update the vote endpoints to read/write the individual report key (report:{id}) directly instead of modifying the index array. This also fixes the vote race condition.

stories.title: Remove unsafe type assertions in upload.ts
acceptance_criteria: No 'as any' or 'as unknown' in upload.ts
Proper typed interfaces for AI API responses
TypeScript compiles without errors
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/routes/upload.ts:87,92,167. Define AIRunResponse interface. Replace as any with proper types. Add parseInt NaN guard on line 167.

stories.title: Add error handling to JSON.parse calls in community.ts
acceptance_criteria: All JSON.parse calls wrapped in try-catch
Fallback to empty defaults on parse failure
Structured error logging on parse failure
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/routes/community.ts:48,66,73,130. Wrap each JSON.parse in try-catch with default fallback (empty array or null) and structuredLog warning.

stories.title: Fix duplicate scamTypeMap population in campaign-aggregator.ts
acceptance_criteria: scamTypeMap does not overwrite existing entries
Map.has() check before insertion or Set-based dedup
Unit tests pass
stories.context: File: src/worker/lib/campaign-aggregator.ts:47. Second iteration overwrites first. Use Map.has() guard or accumulate with Set.
